title: Draftboard
summary: A production-built SVG whiteboard proving Octane pointer capture, imperative refs, keyed identity, keyboard history, portals, and resilient autosave.

journeys.title: Load deterministic deep-linked boards and persist a first object from the empty canvas
Capture a high-frequency multi-object drag beyond the SVG while a keyed survivor retains identity
Draw a rectangle, zoom through the canvas handle, and pan the native SVG surface
Focus imperatively, undo and redo keyboard edits, and restore focus from portaled help
Retry deterministic failures while rapid offline edits converge to the latest saved board

faultScenarios.description: The load-failure scenario fails one deterministic board load and succeeds on explicit retry.
The save-failure scenario keeps edits visible through one failed autosave and saves the latest document on retry.
Native offline events queue completed canvas actions and reconnect saves the latest document.
